# GameZipper - Free Online Games
> 53 free browser-based HTML5 games. No download, no signup required. Play instantly in any modern web browser on desktop and mobile.

## About
GameZipper is a collection of free online HTML5 games playable instantly in any browser. All games are free, require no downloads or accounts, and work on desktop and mobile devices.

## Puzzle Games
- 2048 Galaxy: Classic 2048 number sliding puzzle with space theme. Slide tiles to combine them and reach 2048. URL: https://gamezipper.com/2048/
- Bolt Jam 3D: Unscrew bolts and untangle rings in this mind-bending 3D screw puzzle game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/bolt-jam-3d/
- Color Sort Puzzle: Sort colored balls into tubes. 25 challenging levels of color-matching fun. URL: https://gamezipper.com/color-sort/
- Crossword Puzzle: Classic daily crossword puzzle with word clues. URL: https://gamezipper.com/crossword/
- Dessert Blast: Match and blast delicious desserts in this sweet match-3 puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/dessert-blast/
- Fill The Fridge: Pack items into a fridge in this satisfying sorting puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/fill-fridge/
- Glyph Quest: Rotate hexagonal runes to connect ancient energy paths across 5 civilizations. 50 levels. URL: https://gamezipper.com/glyph-quest/
- Hex Block Puzzle: Drag hexagonal blocks to fill the grid in this relaxing puzzle game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/hex-block/
- Kitty's Café: Adopt a stray kitty and build the cutest cat café. Merge items to fulfill orders. URL: https://gamezipper.com/kitty-cafe/
- Little Alchemy: Combine elements to discover new ones in this classic crafting puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/little-alchemy/
- Magic Sort: Sort water colors into tubes by pouring. A relaxing color sorting puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/magic-sort/
- Ocean Gem Pop: Shoot gem bubbles in the deep ocean. Match 3+ to pop. 10 levels of sparkling fun. URL: https://gamezipper.com/ocean-gem-pop/
- Paint Splash: Swipe color blocks to create stunning abstract art. Match & splash paint. URL: https://gamezipper.com/paint-splash/
- Pipe Connect: Rotate pipes to connect water flow from source to drain. URL: https://gamezipper.com/pipe-connect/
- Pixel Logic: Nonogram picture puzzle. Fill cells to reveal hidden pixel art. URL: https://gamezipper.com/pixel-logic/
- Sand Balls: Dig paths to guide balls to the goal. Physics-based puzzle fun. URL: https://gamezipper.com/sand-balls/
- Sudoku: Classic 9x9 number placement puzzle. Multiple difficulty levels. URL: https://gamezipper.com/sudoku/
- Sushi Stack: Stack matching sushi rolls on chopsticks to clear the board. Japanese-themed color sort puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/sushi-stack/
- Tile Dynasty: Mahjong-style tile matching puzzle with dynasty themes. URL: https://gamezipper.com/tile-dynasty/
- Triple Tile: Match 3 identical tiles in this addictive 3D tile puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/triple-tile/
- Unblock Me: Slide blocks to free the red block in this classic sliding puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/unblock-me/
- Watermelon Merge: Drop fruits to merge them into bigger ones — Suika-style game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/watermelon-merge/
- Wood Block Puzzle: Drag wooden blocks to fill rows and columns. Relaxing yet challenging. URL: https://gamezipper.com/wood-block-puzzle/
- Word Puzzle: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries with color-coded hints. New puzzle every day. URL: https://gamezipper.com/word-puzzle/

## Arcade Games
- Alien Whack: Whack aliens before they escape! Space-themed reflex game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/alien-whack/
- Arrow Escape: Clear the board by matching arrow directions in this space puzzle. URL: https://gamezipper.com/arrow-escape/
- Ball Catch: Catch falling balls in this simple arcade game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/ball-catch/
- Basketball Shoot: Shoot hoops and score baskets in this basketball arcade game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/basketball-shoot/
- Bounce Bot: Flip gravity to guide ZIP the robot through 30 levels of factory mayhem. One-tap runner. URL: https://gamezipper.com/bounce-bot/
- Brick Breaker: Classic breakout arcade game. Bounce a ball to smash bricks with power-ups. URL: https://gamezipper.com/brick-breaker/
- Bubble Pop: Shoot and pop bubbles in this classic bubble shooter. URL: https://gamezipper.com/bubble-pop/
- Catch Turkey: Catch falling turkeys before they hit the ground. URL: https://gamezipper.com/catch-turkey/
- Flappy Wings: One-tap endless arcade game. Tap to fly through gaps between pipes. URL: https://gamezipper.com/flappy-wings/
- Fruit Slash: Slice fruits like a ninja! Swipe to cut as many as you can. URL: https://gamezipper.com/fruit-slash/
- Neon Run: Endless neon-lit platform runner. Dodge obstacles at high speed. URL: https://gamezipper.com/neon-run/
- Phantom Blade: Throw glowing blades into a spinning rune disc. Dark neon aesthetics, 15 levels. URL: https://gamezipper.com/phantom-blade/
- Pong: Classic arcade tennis. Play against the computer. URL: https://gamezipper.com/pong/
- Slope: 3D rolling ball game on a neon track. Speed increases as you go. URL: https://gamezipper.com/slope/
- Snake: Classic snake arcade game. Control your snake, eat food to grow longer. URL: https://gamezipper.com/snake/
- Stacker: Block stacking precision game. Time your taps to stack as high as possible. URL: https://gamezipper.com/stacker/
- T-Rex Dino Runner: The Chrome dinosaur game. Jump over cacti and dodge pterodactyls. URL: https://gamezipper.com/t-rex/
- Whack-A-Mole: Classic whack-a-mole reflex game. Hit moles before time runs out. URL: https://gamezipper.com/whack-a-mole/

## Idle & Strategy Games
- Idle Clicker: Magic-themed idle clicker. Click to earn resources and upgrade your powers. URL: https://gamezipper.com/idle-clicker/
- SlackOff Defense: Build screen turrets, dodge your boss, survive 8 inspection waves. Office tower defense. URL: https://gamezipper.com/mo-yu-fayu/

## Simulation & Casual Games
- Abyss Chef: Play as Ollie the octopus chef. Fish deep sea creatures, cook meals, build your underwater restaurant. URL: https://gamezipper.com/abyss-chef/
- Cloud & Sheep: Take care of cute sheep — feed, play, and protect them. URL: https://gamezipper.com/cloud-sheep/

## Card & Board Games
- Chess: Classic chess game. Play against AI with multiple difficulty levels. URL: https://gamezipper.com/chess/
- Memory Match: Card matching memory game. Flip cards and find matching pairs. URL: https://gamezipper.com/memory-match/
- Minesweeper: Classic mine-clearing puzzle game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/minesweeper/
- Solitaire: Classic Klondike solitaire card game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/solitaire/
- Tetris: Classic block-stacking puzzle game. URL: https://gamezipper.com/tetris/

## Skill & Brain Games
- Reaction Time Test: How fast is your brain? Measure your reaction speed in milliseconds. URL: https://gamezipper.com/reaction-time/
- Typing Speed Test: Measure your WPM and improve your typing skills. URL: https://gamezipper.com/typing-speed/
